'''''Timely''''' was an [[Imperial Armored Transport]] of the same class as [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']]. Both vessels saw service with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]], participating in a series of intelligence and salvage operations at the former [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] base on [[Dankayo/Legends|Dankayo]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
